response_text:
Yes, try getting the QR from MaxClaw dashboard first.

The flow might be:
1. MaxClaw generates pairing code/QR
2. Your local Mac connects TO MaxClaw (not the other way around)

So check MaxClaw dashboard for "Add Node" or "Pair Device" — it should generate a code.

Then we'll see if your local can connect to it. Try that and let me know what code you get.
